game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler from the creators of Bastion, Transistor, and Pyre.
Hades is a god-like rogue-like dungeon crawler that combines the best aspects of Supergiant's critically acclaimed titles, including the fast-paced action of Bastion, the rich atmosphere and depth of Transistor, and the character-driven storytelling of Pyre.

BATTLE OUT OF HELL

As the immortal Prince of the Underworld, you'll wield the powers and mythic weapons of Olympus to break free from the clutches of the god of the dead himself, while growing stronger and unraveling more of the story with each unique escape attempt.

UNLEASH THE FURY OF OLYMPUS

The Olympians have your back! Meet Zeus, Athena, Poseidon, and many more, and choose from their dozens of powerful Boons that enhance your abilities. There are thousands of viable character builds to discover as you go.


BEFRIEND GODS, GHOSTS, AND MONSTERS

A fully-voiced cast of colorful, larger-than-life characters is waiting to meet you! Grow your relationships with them, and experience thousands of unique story events as you learn about what's really at stake for this big, dysfunctional family.

BUILT FOR REPLAYABILITY

New surprises await each time you delve into the ever-shifting Underworld, whose guardian bosses will remember you. Use the powerful Mirror of Night to grow permanently stronger, and give yourself a leg up the next time you run away from home.

NOTHING IS IMPOSSIBLE

Permanent upgrades mean you don't have to be a god yourself to experience the exciting combat and gripping story. Though, if you happen to be one, crank up the challenge and get ready for some white-knuckle action that will put your well-practiced skills to the test.


SIGNATURE SUPERGIANT STYLE

The rich, atmospheric presentation and unique melding of gameplay and narrative that's been core to Supergiant's games is here in full force: spectacular hand-painted environments and a blood-pumping original score bring the Underworld to life.
game_info.description: Escape the Underworld as Zagreus, the immortal prince! Battle through ever-shifting dungeon rooms filled with deadly enemies. Collect powerful boons from the Olympian gods to enhance your abilities. Defeat room guardians, survive increasingly difficult encounters, and reach the surface to win. Each run makes you stronger with permanent upgrades. Death is not the end—it's just the beginning of your next attempt!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Zagreus in four directions
Space: Dash (quick dodge with brief invulnerability)
Z: Attack (swing weapon in the direction you're facing)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and navigation through empty rooms. Validates that the player can move in all directions and transition between rooms correctly. Ensures collision detection with walls works properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player systematically through available rooms using arrow keys. Navigate to room exits and verify room transitions. Test movement in all four directions and verify boundaries are respected.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves through multiple rooms without getting stuck. Room transitions work smoothly. Collision detection prevents moving through walls. Test is successful when player completes several room transitions.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves through multiple rooms without getting stuck. Room transitions work smoothly. Collision detection prevents moving through walls. Test is successful when player completes several room transitions.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by implementing an optimal combat and progression strategy. Validates that the player can defeat enemies, collect boons, clear rooms, and ultimately reach the surface to win the game.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Engage enemies strategically using attacks and dashes. Prioritize collecting health pickups and boons. Clear each room efficiently by defeating all enemies. Progress through multiple rooms until reaching the final escape room. Use dash for dodging enemy attacks.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player defeats all enemies in each room, survives combat encounters, collects power-ups, and successfully reaches the surface exit. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful when win condition is achieved.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics including attacking, dashing, and taking damage. Validates that combat interactions work correctly including hit detection, damage dealing, and invulnerability frames.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Actively engage enemies using the attack key. Test dash invulnerability by dashing through enemy attacks. Verify that attacks connect with enemies and deal damage. Test player damage reception and health reduction.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Attacks successfully hit and damage enemies. Dash provides temporary invulnerability. Player takes damage when hit by enemies. Combat feels responsive and functional. Test is successful when all combat mechanics work as intended.
TEST_3.description: Tests combat mechanics including attacking, dashing, and taking damage. Validates that combat interactions work correctly including hit detection, damage dealing, and invulnerability frames.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests the boon collection and power-up system. Validates that boons are offered after clearing rooms, can be selected, and properly enhance player abilities.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Clear rooms to trigger boon offerings. Collect different types of boons to test various enhancements. Verify that boon effects are applied to player stats and abilities. Test multiple boon combinations.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Boons appear after clearing rooms. Collecting boons enhances player abilities (damage, speed, health, etc.). Multiple boons stack appropriately. Test is successful when boon system functions correctly and improves player power.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests enemy AI behavior and spawning. Validates that enemies spawn correctly, pursue the player intelligently, attack when in range, and provide appropriate challenge.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Enter rooms and observe enemy behavior. Move around to test enemy pursuit. Test enemy attack patterns and timing. Verify different enemy types have distinct behaviors.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Enemies spawn in rooms correctly. Enemies pursue and attack the player intelligently. Different enemy types exhibit unique behaviors. Challenge scales appropriately. Test is successful when enemy AI works as designed.
